---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a public-safe toolkit improvement
title: "Feature: "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed change.

## Problem it solves

What workflow, bug, or contributor need does this improve?

## Proposed scope

Keep the scope small and clear.

## Public safety check

Confirm that this change does not add:

- private Kynward content;
- unreleased lore or narrative material;
- final art, logos, icons, music, sound, fonts, screenshots, or mockups;
- third-party assets without a compatible license;
- secrets, credentials, or local environment files.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Documentation is updated if needed.
- [ ] Examples are synthetic and public-safe.
- [ ] Comments and descriptions are written in English.
- [ ] The change can be understood without access to the private game repository.
